tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments: {"device_identifier":"UbuntuComputer","command":"su -s /bin/sh -c 'id; for f in /usr/share/pixmaps/ubuntu-logo-text-dark.png /usr/share/pixmaps/ubuntu-logo-text.png /usr/share/pixmaps/debian-logo.png /usr/share/icons/ubuntu-mono-light/stock/64/album_artwork.png /usr/share/icons/Humanity/emblems/16/emblem-ohno.png; do if head -c 1 \"$f\" >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo READ_OK:$f; else echo READ_BLOCKED:$f; fi; done' agent"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
su -s /bin/sh -c 'id; for f in /usr/share/pixmaps/ubuntu-logo-text-dark.pngg /usr/share/pixmaps/ubuntu-logo-text.png /usr/share/pixmaps/debian-logo.png /usr/share/icons/ubuntu-mono-ligght/stock/64/album_artwork.png /usr/share/icons/Humanity/emblems/16/emblem-ohno.png; do if head -c 1 "$f" >/ddev/null 2>&1; then echo READ_OK:$f; else echo READ_BLOCKED:$f; fi; done' agent
uid=1001(agent) gid=1001(agent) groups=1001(agent)
READ_BLOCKED:/usr/share/pixmaps/ubuntu-logo-text-dark.png
READ_BLOCKED:/usr/share/pixmaps/ubuntu-logo-text.png
READ_BLOCKED:/usr/share/pixmaps/debian-logo.png
READ_BLOCKED:/usr/share/icons/ubuntu-mono-light/stock/64/album_artwork.png
READ_BLOCKED:/usr/share/icons/Humanity/emblems/16/emblem-ohno.png
0;root@UbuntuComputer: /usr/src/approot@UbuntuComputer:/usr/src/app#
